## Summary

<!-- Brief description of what this PR does and why -->

Closes #(issue)

## Type of Change

<!-- Please use conventional commit type prefixes in your PR title: -->
<!-- feat:, fix:, chore:, docs:, refactor:, perf:, ci:, test:, style: -->

- [ ] **feat** — New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] **fix** — Bug fix
- [ ] **chore** — Maintenance, build, or dependency changes
- [ ] **docs** — Documentation only
- [ ] **refactor** — Code change with no functional change
- [ ] **perf** — Performance improvement
- [ ] **ci** — CI/CD configuration change
- [ ] **test** — Adding or updating tests

## How Has This Been Tested?

<!-- Describe how you tested your changes -->
- [ ] Frontend builds successfully (`npm run build`)
- [ ] TypeScript type-check passes (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] Server type-check passes (`cd server && npx tsc --noEmit`)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the existing code style and patterns
- [ ] I have updated documentation/comments where needed
- [ ] No new external dependencies added without review
- [ ] I have tested the change locally and it works as expected
- [ ] The PR title follows conventional commit format
